narrative:
Precinct Madison Village Aa (precinct in Lake County) has 1,116 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.9%, a modest Republican lean of 5.8 percentage points.
